company.name: AgentsOX
company.purpose: AgentsOX helps businesses of any size run more efficiently with custom technology. We sit with each client one-on-one, get to the real pain points, and build a solution shaped around how that business actually works.
company.positioning: Every project starts from your actual problem, not a template or a fixed product. You work directly with the founder, and the system is built for your business - not adapted from someone else's.
company.promise: We listen first, figure out what actually needs solving, build the simplest thing that works, and stay with you until you trust it.
company.symbolMeaning: The ox stands for steady, dependable work - systems that keep running even when things get busy.

audience: Any business with a problem worth solving - any size, any industry. Whatever's slowing the owner down, from buried admin to a larger company stuck on legacy systems, there's almost always a way to fix it with the right tech. That's what we build.

services.name: AI assistants and tools
services.description: An AI assistant that takes over the repetitive thinking - the stuff that eats your time but doesn't really need you.

services.name: Workflow automations
services.description: The boring admin that fills your day - follow-ups, scheduling, CRM updates - set up once to run on its own.

services.name: Dashboards and analytics
services.description: One screen that tells you how the business is really doing, so you're not guessing from scattered spreadsheets.

services.name: Branding and marketing
services.description: The brand side too: how you show up, a website that actually brings in business, and content that helps the right people find you.

services.name: One place to run everything
services.description: A single workspace to run the whole business from - everything together, instead of a dozen open tabs.

process: We start with one real problem and how you handle it today.
We map out your tools, the people involved, and where things break down.
We pick the smallest thing worth building first - the one that helps right away.
We build a working version and test it, including what happens when something goes wrong.
Then we keep refining it until you trust it, day to day.
trustPrinciples: You stay in control of anything that matters - the important calls never get fully automated.
Whatever we build, you should be able to understand it and keep it running without us.
No AI hype - if it won't genuinely help your business, we won't push it.
We talk through privacy and who can access what before we build anything.
If an off-the-shelf product would serve you better, we'll say so - we only build what you actually need.
